arts.ttl: Aston Villa update on €60m Diego Carlos REPLACEMENT as DEAL SEALED
arts.sum: Donyell Malen has already been signed from Borussia Dortmund for €25 million and two more players could arrive quickly at Villa Park, according to football transfer news reporter Romano . Aston Villa update on €60m Diego Carlos REPLACEMENT as DEAL SEALED

arts.ttl: Transfer news and rumours: Andres Garcia to Aston Villa, Tom Lawrence to Besiktas, Jakub Moder to Brighton
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up the latest transfer news and rumours, including Andres Garcia to Aston Villa, Tom Lawrence to Rangers and Jakub Moder to Brighton & Hove Albion.

arts.ttl: Transfer rumors, news: Arsenal ready move for Gyökeres, Sesko
arts.sum: Arsenal are desperate to fix their striker problems and could make a move for Viktor Gyökeres or Benjamin Sesko before the window closes, while Real Madrid are ready to make another offer for Liverpool's Trent Alexander-Arnold this month. However, Marca says Real Madrid -- who want to sign the player on a free transfer in the summer -- are "satisfied" with the situation around Davies and believe he has turned down an improved contract offer from Bayern.

arts.ttl: William Saliba sparks worrying Arsenal injury concern ahead of Aston Villa clash
arts.sum: William Saliba has been a key player for Arsenal this season, helping them to secure the best defensive record in the Premier League, but the Frenchman could now be sidelined through injury

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta reveals Bukayo Saka return plan Arsenal will love
arts.sum: Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta has urged Bukayo Saka to time off while he recovers from a serious hamstring injury - insisting the winger needs time to "refresh" Arteta, though, has urged the forward to take a few days off for a holiday as he believes it will benefit Saka's rehabilitation.

arts.ttl: Insistence Aston Villa bid is just around the corner – Monchi determined to reunite with player
arts.sum: An official Aston Villa bid arriving for Sevilla defender Loïc Badé is considered a matter of time. That’s according to Estadio Deportivo, who say Sevilla need a large sale to help their ‘battered accounts’ and Badé could be it. They report that the defender is the ‘great candidate’ to pack his bags this month. arts.ttl: Report: Mikel Arteta gives green light to Arsenal to sign expensive attacker in January
arts.sum: Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta has given his approval to the club to make a move for Sporting Lisbon attacker Viktor Gyokeres this month, according to L’Equipe. The Gunners are struggling in front of goal with the poor form of first choice attacker Kai Havertz. arts.ttl: Aston Villa intensify negotiations with Sevilla to sign Loïc Badé
arts.sum: According to Foot Mercato, Aston Villa have intensified negotiations with Sevilla to sign French centre-back Loïc Badé (24) in the January transfer. Unai Emery has identified the Frenchman as an ideal…

arts.ttl: Prince William 'uses secret name' to follow gossip on Aston Villa fan forums
arts.sum: Prince William is a huge Aston Villa fan, attending many of their games and he has even been a regular face at Villa's Bodymoor Heath training ground - having chats with boss Unai Emery

arts.ttl: Arsenal given ‘VERY LIKELY’ message over wonderkid Nypan
arts.sum: This ability to be decisive at such a young age has fuelled transfer interest in the player, with Arsenal and Manchester United among the clubs interested in Nypan. While Pimenta is currently sifting her way through potential destinations for the much-wanted player, interested parties have been given a warning that Nypan is unlikely to leave during the January window.
